copy.announcement: Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume and receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE.
copy.eyebrow: One finishing touch. One unforgettable statement piece.
copy.headline: When You Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume Today, You Get the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE.
copy.subheadline: Let cream tweed, multicoloured flecks, a braided drawcord, and fringed hems carry the outfit while everything else stays simple.

story.heading: When simple starts to feel forgettable
story.body: You know the moment: a casual plan is coming up, your reliable basics are ready, but the outfit still needs one detail that feels unmistakably yours.

story.heading: Make one piece the whole point
story.body: When one piece carries the colour, texture, and silhouette, you can keep the rest of your outfit clean and still look deliberately styled.

story.heading: Colour and texture, already built in
story.body: The pants are made from cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems. Pair them with a fitted tee, knit, or sweater and let those details lead.

story.heading: A closer look at the statement
story.body: Cream tweed gives the pair its soft base. Multicoloured flecks add the visual spark, while the braided drawcord and fringed hems finish the design.

story.heading: Built for the plan already in your calendar
story.body: Wear them when a coffee turns into a long city walk, when a casual evening deserves more personality, or when you want your trousers to carry an otherwise simple look.

story.heading: The silhouette is part of the design
story.body: The pants are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit with an adjustable elastic waist. The shape is intentional, and the waist lets you adjust how the pair sits.

story.heading: More style without more competing pieces
story.body: You do not need to stack prints, layers, and accessories. Choose a simple top, add your usual shoes, and let the trousers be the memorable part.

story.heading: Choose with the measurements in front of you
story.body: The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44. The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.

story.heading: Treat the tweed like the statement fabric it is
story.body: The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces that may snag it. Know the care before first wear and keep the textured finish looking considered.

story.heading: Two parts of one getting-ready moment
story.body: Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume is the paid finishing touch. The Sprinkle Tweed Pants are the FREE statement piece that shapes the outfit.

story.heading: The complete offer, clearly stated
story.body: Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume today and receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE. Ships within 4 days, with 90-day returns and a five-year warranty.

story.heading: One pair, three easy moments
story.body: Lead with them for a casual social plan, style them with a fitted top or sweater for a weekend city outing, or use their texture and colour for a creative evening look.

story.heading: Three steps before you head out
story.body: Choose XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, or L-XL for EU 42-44. Adjust the elastic waist for the relaxed baggy fit. Dry clean only and avoid rough surfaces that may snag the tweed.

story.heading: Finish the look with the complete offer
story.body: Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume and claim the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE in the same offer.

copy.offer_heading: Get the finishing touch. Receive the statement piece FREE.
copy.offer_body: Your offer includes Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume as the paid product and the Sprinkle Tweed Pants as the FREE companion. The design-led trousers bring the colour, texture, and relaxed shape to your outfit.
copy.final_body: Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume today and receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE.
copy.faq_heading: Your pants and offer questions, answered

proof_sections.social_heading: Start simple and let the trousers lead
proof_sections.recognition_heading: For days when basics need one memorable piece
proof_sections.recognition_body: See how a statement trouser can shape casual plans, city outings, and creative evenings without crowding the rest of the look.
proof_sections.compliments_heading: Cream tweed, colour flecks, drawcord, and fringe
proof_sections.wall_kicker: More ways to wear the idea
proof_sections.wall_heading: See the statement piece through different eyes
proof_sections.wall_body: Different people, settings, and styling moments show how one distinctive pair can become the centre of a simple outfit.

faq.question: What is included in the offer?
faq.answer: You get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume as the paid product and the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE.

faq.question: What do the pants look like?
faq.answer: The pants are made from cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems.

faq.question: How do the pants fit?
faq.answer: The pants are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit with an adjustable elastic waist.

faq.question: Which size should I choose?
faq.answer: The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44. The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.

faq.question: How should I care for the pants?
faq.answer: The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces that may snag it.

faq.question: What are the fulfilment terms?
faq.answer: Ships within 4 days, with 90-day returns and a five-year warranty.

sample_stories.name: Maya R.
sample_stories.headline: The outfit finally had a point
sample_stories.review_text: I kept the top simple and let the flecked tweed carry the look. That was exactly the balance I wanted for a casual night out.

sample_stories.name: Sofia L.
sample_stories.headline: Easy for a city Saturday
sample_stories.review_text: I pictured these with a fitted navy top and my everyday shoes. The texture gives the outfit enough interest without asking for extra layers.

sample_stories.name: Elena M.
sample_stories.headline: Less busy than I expected
sample_stories.review_text: I usually hesitate around colourful pieces, but the cream base makes the flecks easier to style. I would keep everything else quiet.

sample_stories.name: Nadia K.
sample_stories.headline: I bought the idea for myself
sample_stories.review_text: I wanted one pair that could make my own basics feel intentional. The braided drawcord and fringe are the details that sold the look for me.

sample_stories.name: Amelia T.
sample_stories.headline: The measurements made it clearer
sample_stories.review_text: I checked the size range and the 110 cm length before styling the outfit in my head. Having those details upfront made the decision easier.

sample_stories.name: Clara B.
sample_stories.headline: Just add a black top
sample_stories.review_text: My plan is straightforward: black top, these trousers, simple shoes. The fabric already brings all the colour and texture I need.

sample_stories.name: Isla P.
sample_stories.headline: A fast answer before going out
sample_stories.review_text: When time is short, I do not want to build an outfit from six different ideas. One strong pair with a plain top is much more useful to me.

sample_stories.name: Leonie S.
sample_stories.headline: The texture leads the look
sample_stories.review_text: I like that the interest comes from the cream tweed, colour flecks, drawcord, and fringe together. It feels designed from top to hem.

sample_stories.name: Marta V.
sample_stories.headline: Could one pair do enough
sample_stories.review_text: I wondered if simple styling would feel unfinished. With this much texture and colour in the trousers, a quiet top actually feels like the right choice.

sample_stories.name: Freya D.
sample_stories.headline: The relaxed shape is deliberate
sample_stories.review_text: I would wear the baggy silhouette as the point, not try to disguise it. The adjustable waist helps me set how I want the pair to sit.

sample_stories.name: Ana C.
sample_stories.headline: I checked the care first
sample_stories.review_text: Delicate tweed needs thoughtful care, so I was glad to see dry-clean-only guidance before deciding. I know how I would look after the pair.

sample_stories.name: Camille J.
sample_stories.headline: The FREE pair is the visual payoff
sample_stories.review_text: The perfume is the paid part of the offer, and the trousers are the FREE statement piece. That structure is easy for me to understand.

sample_stories.name: Eva N.
sample_stories.headline: Ready for a low-key dinner
sample_stories.review_text: For a casual dinner, I would pair them with a charcoal knit and let the flecks brighten the whole outfit. Nothing else needs to compete.

sample_stories.name: Lucia H.
sample_stories.headline: My basics feel useful again
sample_stories.review_text: A red crew neck, simple shoes, and these trousers already feel complete. I like having one obvious place for the eye to land.

sample_stories.name: Tara W.
sample_stories.headline: Colour without second-guessing
sample_stories.review_text: I would let the trousers enter the room first and keep the rest restrained. That gives me a more confident way to wear colour.

sample_stories.name: Zoe A.
sample_stories.headline: The white shirt gets a new role
sample_stories.review_text: I already own the simple pieces. These trousers are the part that would make my white shirt feel different for another casual plan.

sample_stories.name: Lina F.
sample_stories.headline: The hem detail caught me
sample_stories.review_text: The fringed hems make the finish feel considered, and the braided drawcord adds another colour detail near the waist. I notice those choices.

sample_stories.name: Sara G.
sample_stories.headline: Not another plain trouser
sample_stories.review_text: I have enough neutral trousers that disappear into an outfit. This pair gives me a different option because the texture is the feature.

sample_stories.name: Mila E.
sample_stories.headline: Simple does not have to vanish
sample_stories.review_text: I can keep my top and shoes familiar without the outfit fading into the background. The trousers provide the memorable part.

sample_stories.name: Iris O.
sample_stories.headline: Made for an ordinary Saturday
sample_stories.review_text: I would wear them for coffee, browsing shops, and an unplanned late lunch. A soft knit keeps the statement grounded for the whole day.

sample_stories.name: Layla Q.
sample_stories.headline: Exactly enough for the gallery night
sample_stories.review_text: For one creative evening, I want texture and colour without building a costume. These trousers with a clean top hit that specific mood.

sample_stories.name: Noor I.
sample_stories.headline: The adjustable waist matters
sample_stories.review_text: I came for the unusual tweed and stayed interested because the waist is adjustable. The practical detail belongs inside the design.

sample_stories.name: Ines U.
sample_stories.headline: Three steps and the outfit is set
sample_stories.review_text: I would choose my EU size, adjust the waist, and pair the trousers with a cream knit. The care instructions are clear for afterwards.

sample_stories.name: Ruby Y.
sample_stories.headline: This is the piece I would choose
sample_stories.review_text: For a casual evening, I want the cream tweed and colour flecks to lead. I would take the complete offer and keep the styling simple.
